inputs.label: standard
inputs.project: SIGNAL — a podcast about whistleblowers and institutional accountability
inputs.tone: Tense, serious, urgent but not sensationalist. The aesthetics of high-stakes journalism.
inputs.audience: Educated adults 30-55 who read investigative journalism
inputs.reference_approach: The visual identity of The Intercept, ProPublica
inputs.reference_avoid: CNN red, Fox blue, any cable news palette

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.project: A food and culture YouTube channel

inputs.label: european
inputs.project: ARCHIPELAGO — a magazine and podcast about island communities across Europe, from the Scottish Hebrides to Greek islands to Nordic archipelagos
inputs.tone: Oceanic, contemplative, specific to place. Not tourist aesthetics — the working life of island people.
inputs.reference_approach: Kinfolk magazine's restraint, the photography of Ragnar Axelsson (RAX)
inputs.reference_avoid: Travel magazine blue-and-white Mediterranean cliches, Santorini Instagram
inputs.preference: A palette that shifts between cool oceanic tones and warm interior hearth tones depending on context
